title: Mildly Mustardy Norwegian Fish Curry
description: A velvety and energizing Norwegian dish featuring poached fish in a mildly mustardy curry sauce, served in a banana leaf vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Poach the cod fillets in a large pot of simmering water until cooked through.
In a blender, combine the white vinegar, mustard powder, curry powder, and a pinch of salt and pepper, and blend until smooth.
In a large saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the blended curry sauce.
Bring the curry sauce to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the coconut milk and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
To serve, place a poached cod fillet on each banana leaf, spoon the curry sauce over the top, and serve immediately.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
Discard the banana leaves after serving, as they are not edible.
